neighborhoods.name: Yulee Center / US-17 Corridor
neighborhoods.description: Growing unincorporated community on the US-17 corridor with new commercial development and services

housing.predominantType: Newer houses, apartments, and planned developments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Yulee. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Fernandina Beach / Amelia Island
neighborhoods.description: Historic Victorian seaport on Amelia Island with Centre Street shops, beach, and Ritz-Carlton resort

housing.predominantType: Historic homes, beach condos, and island properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Yulee's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Callahan / Hilliard
neighborhoods.description: Western Nassau County communities with very affordable housing and rural character

housing.predominantType: Modest houses, mobile homes, and rural properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Wildlight / East Nassau
neighborhoods.description: New master-planned community by Rayonier with trails, schools, and modern amenities

housing.predominantType: Newer single-family homes in planned community

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
